title: LGTM Stack — Anomaly Detection & Outlier Analysis
description: Advanced anomaly detection using statistical analysis. Identifies deviations from baseline in latency, error rates, throughput, and resource usage across Grafana, Mimir, Loki, and Tempo. Uses z-score patterns and standard deviation bands.

options.content:
LGTM Stack — Anomaly Detection & Outlier Analysis

Statistical Analysis • $sensitivity σ Sensitivity • Real-Time

panels.title: Anomaly Status — Current vs Baseline Ratios
Grafana Latency Anomaly
panels.description: Current P95 latency vs 1-hour rolling average. >2.0x means latency has doubled.

panels.title: Mimir Error Rate Anomaly
panels.description: Current Mimir 5xx error rate vs 1h baseline. >3.0x indicates a significant spike in errors.

panels.title: Loki Ingestion Anomaly
panels.description: Loki ingestion rate vs 1h baseline. <0.5x = sudden drop, >2x = ingestion spike.

panels.title: Tempo Span Anomaly
panels.description: Tempo span ingestion rate vs 1h baseline. >2x indicates an unexpected surge in tracing volume.

panels.title: Memory Anomaly
panels.description: Current resident memory vs 1h rolling average. >1.3x signals a memory growth anomaly.

panels.title: CPU Anomaly
panels.description: Current CPU usage rate vs 1h rolling average. >1.3x signals abnormal CPU consumption.

panels.title: Grafana Latency — Deviation Bands
panels.description: P95 latency with statistical deviation bands. Points outside the band are anomalies. Sensitivity controlled by the σ variable.

targets.expr: avg_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m]) + $sensitivity * stddev_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m])

avg_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m]) - $sensitivity * stddev_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m])

panels.title: Mimir Write Latency — Deviation Bands
panels.description: Mimir push P95 latency with statistical deviation bands. Points outside the band indicate write path anomalies.

targets.expr: avg_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"/distributor.Distributor/Push|api_v1_push|/push"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m]) + $sensitivity * stddev_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"/distributor.Distributor/Push|api_v1_push|/push"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m])

avg_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"/distributor.Distributor/Push|api_v1_push|/push"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m]) - $sensitivity * stddev_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(cortex_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", route=~"/distributor.Distributor/Push|api_v1_push|/push"}[5m])) by (le))[1h:5m])

panels.title: Multi-Service Error Rate vs Baseline
panels.description: Current error rate vs 6-hour rolling baseline for each service. Deviations from baseline indicate emerging issues.

panels.title: Error Rate Anomaly — Current vs Baseline
Ingestion Volume — Current vs Expected
panels.description: Loki ingestion rate with ±σ deviation bands. Values outside the bands indicate abnormal ingestion volume.

panels.title: Mimir Samples — Current vs Expected
panels.description: Mimir sample ingestion rate with ±σ deviation bands. Anomalies indicate unexpected changes in metric volume.

panels.title: Memory Usage — Anomaly Detection
panels.description: Resident memory per LGTM service with upper deviation band. Sustained values above the band indicate memory leaks or abnormal growth.

targets.expr: sum by (job) (avg_over_time(process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h:5m])) + $sensitivity * sum by (job) (stddev_over_time(process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h:5m]))

panels.title: GC Pause Anomaly
panels.description: Go GC pause duration rate with upper deviation band. Spikes above the band indicate GC pressure anomalies.

targets.expr: sum by (job) (avg_over_time(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_sum{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])[1h:5m])) + $sensitivity * sum by (job) (stddev_over_time(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_sum{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])[1h:5m]))

panels.title: Goroutine Count Anomaly
panels.description: Goroutine count per service with deviation bands. Sustained growth above the upper band may signal goroutine leaks.

targets.expr: sum by (job) (avg_over_time(go_goroutines{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h:5m])) + $sensitivity * sum by (job) (stddev_over_time(go_goroutines{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h:5m]))

sum by (job) (avg_over_time(go_goroutines{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h:5m])) - $sensitivity * sum by (job) (stddev_over_time(go_goroutines{job=~".*grafana.*|.*mimir.*|.*loki.*|.*tempo.*", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h:5m]))

panels.title: Endpoint Latency Outliers
panels.description: Endpoints whose current P95 latency significantly exceeds their 1h baseline. Ratio >2.0 = anomalous.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$__rate_interval]))) / clamp_min(avg_over_time(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])))[1h:5m]), 0.001))

panels.title: Endpoint Error Spike Detection
panels.description: Endpoints with the largest error rate spike vs their 1h baseline. Ratio >2.0 = anomalous spike.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", status_code=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(avg_over_time(sum by (handler) (rate(grafana_http_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", status_code=~"5.."}[5m]))[1h:5m]), 0.0001))

panels.title: Outlier Endpoint Detection — Latency & Error Spikes
